system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is Sofia Hernandez. I’m calling from Seattle, WA. I wanted to see if I could cancel the grill I ordered recently—I realized I might not need it after all. Can you help me with that?

I can help you with your cancellation request. To begin, I need to verify your identity for security purposes. Could you please provide either:

- The email address associated with your account,  
or  
- Your zip code?

Once I have this information, I’ll look up your order and assist you further.
Sure, my zip code is 98193. I actually don’t remember which email I used, sorry!

Thank you, Sofia. To locate your account, could you please provide your last name as well? I have your first name (Sofia) and your zip code (98193). Once I have your last name, I’ll proceed to verify your account and check your recent grill order.
Of course, it’s Hernandez.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for providing your details. There was a technical issue retrieving your account. Could you please confirm if your first name is spelled "Sofia" and your last name is "Hernandez"? If so, I’ll try again to locate your account using this information and your zip code (98193).

If you have any other details (such as an order number or phone number on file), please let me know as well.

Yes, that’s correct—my first name is spelled S-O-F-I-A and my last name is Hernandez. I’m in Seattle, zip code 98193. I don’t have my order number handy, but my phone number should be on file. Would it help if I gave you that?
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

Thank you for confirming your details. It appears there is a technical issue with locating your account using your name and zip code at the moment. Unfortunately, I am unable to use your phone number for verification.

Would you be able to provide the email address you might have used, even if you’re not completely sure? If not, I can transfer you to a human agent who may be able to assist you further with additional verification methods.

Please let me know how you’d like to proceed.

Oh, I wish I could remember the email, but I honestly have a few and I’m not sure which one I used for this order. If it’s possible, could you transfer me to a human agent? Maybe they can help me verify in another way. I’d really appreciate it!

arguments.summary: User Sofia Hernandez from Seattle, WA (zip 98193) wants to cancel a recent grill order but cannot recall the email used and cannot be verified via name and zip code due to technical issues. User requests transfer to a human agent for further verification and assistance.

messages.content: Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I apologize, but I am currently experiencing a technical issue and am unable to transfer you to a human agent directly through this system. 

I recommend reaching out to our customer service team by phone or through our website’s live chat, where a human agent can assist you with additional verification methods and help you cancel your order.

I’m sorry for the inconvenience. If you remember any additional details (such as your order number or possible email), please let me know and I’ll do my best to assist you here.

That’s okay, I understand things happen! I’ll try to reach out through your website’s live chat or by phone.

Before I go, could you help me with something else? I had another order with two t-shirts—can you tell me which ones I ordered and what materials they’re made of? I’m just curious because I want to make sure they’ll be comfortable.

I’d be happy to help with your t-shirt order! To look up your order details, I’ll need to verify your account first. Since I’m currently unable to locate your account using your name and zip code, and you’re unsure of the email used, I’m unable to access your order information at this time.

If you’re able to provide any additional information—such as an order number, possible email addresses, or any other details—I can try again. Otherwise, a human agent via live chat or phone will be able to assist you further with your t-shirt order details.

If you have any other questions or if you remember more information, please let me know!

Oh, I see! Sorry, I don’t have my order number with me and I really can’t remember which email I used. I’ll try to dig up the confirmation email and reach out to your team through live chat or phone.

Thanks for trying to help! I appreciate your patience. Have a good day!

You’re very welcome, Sofia! Thank you for your understanding and patience. If you find your order confirmation or remember your email, please don’t hesitate to reach out again—I’ll be happy to assist you.

Have a wonderful day, and good luck with your orders!
Thank you so much! I’ll definitely reach out if I find my info. Take care and have a great day!
Thank you, Sofia! Take care and have a great day as well. If you need any assistance in the future, I’m here to help. Goodbye!
Thanks again! Goodbye!

arguments.summary: User Sofia Hernandez from Seattle, WA (zip 98193) wants to cancel a recent grill order but cannot recall the email used and cannot be verified via name and zip code due to technical issues. User requests transfer to a human agent for further verification and assistance.

final_response: Thank you, Sofia! Take care and have a great day as well. If you need any assistance in the future, I’m here to help. Goodbye!
